invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger CanExitAfter(doors, j)} | 0 <= j <= i :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)

ensures.text: forall j: int {:trigger CanExitAfter(doors, j)} | 0 <= j < k :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)
forall j: int {:trigger CanExitAfter(doors, j)} | 0 <= j < k :: !CanExitAfter(doors, j)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger doors[i]} | 0 <= i < n :: doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1
forall i: int {:trigger doors[i]} | 0 <= i < n :: doors[i] == 0 || doors[i] == 1
